title: Manasik
description: A comprehensive Hajj & Umrah companion app guiding pilgrims through rituals, prayer times, reminders, and spiritual journey tracking with a beautiful Islamic design.
tagline: Guiding every step of the spiritual journey
challenge: Millions of pilgrims travel for Hajj and Umrah each year, yet most lack a reliable digital companion that provides step-by-step guidance through complex rituals, real-time prayer schedules, and location-aware reminders — all while working offline in crowded environments with limited connectivity.
solution: We built a beautiful, offline-first mobile app with an intuitive ritual guide, GPS-powered navigation to holy sites, customizable prayer alerts, and a spiritual progress tracker. The app supports Arabic and English with a calligraphic UI that honors the sacred experience.

features.title: Ritual Step-by-Step Guide
features.description: Interactive walkthrough of every Hajj and Umrah ritual with audio narration and visual aids.

features.title: Sacred Site Navigation
features.description: GPS-powered maps with walking routes between holy sites, crowd density indicators, and offline support.

features.title: Smart Prayer Alerts
features.description: Location-aware prayer time notifications with Qibla direction and nearby mosque finder.

features.title: Spiritual Progress Tracker
features.description: Personal dashboard tracking completed rituals, daily prayers, and spiritual milestones.

features.title: Multilingual Support
features.description: Full Arabic and English experience with authentic Islamic calligraphy and right-to-left layouts.

features.title: Offline-First Architecture
features.description: Core features work without internet, syncing seamlessly when connectivity returns.

features.title: Group Coordination
features.description: Real-time location sharing and group messaging to keep travel companions connected in crowded areas.

features.title: Scheduled Reminders
features.description: Custom timed reminders for rituals, hydration, medication, and transportation schedules.

features.title: Dua Library
features.description: Curated collection of supplications for each ritual stage with transliteration and audio playback.

process.description: Conducted field research with pilgrims and scholars to map the complete ritual journey and identify pain points.
Created culturally authentic wireframes and interactive prototypes, tested with diverse user groups.
Built with Flutter for cross-platform consistency, Firebase for real-time sync, and Google Maps for navigation.
Rigorous testing across 20+ devices, offline scenarios, and high-density crowd simulations.
Deployed to App Store and Google Play with continuous updates based on pilgrim feedback during Hajj season.

testimonial.quote: Manasik transformed the Hajj experience for our community. The step-by-step guidance gave pilgrims confidence and peace of mind throughout their sacred journey.
testimonial.author: Ahmed Al-Rashid

title: Weem
description: A grocery delivery platform connecting customers with local supermarkets, featuring real-time order tracking, discount coupons, and seamless payment integration.
tagline: Fresh groceries delivered to your doorstep
challenge: Local supermarkets were losing customers to large delivery platforms but couldn't afford to build their own technology. They needed a white-label solution that preserved their brand identity while offering modern convenience features like real-time tracking and smart discounts.
solution: We created a multi-vendor grocery marketplace with store-branded storefronts, intelligent route optimization for delivery drivers, a coupon engine with geo-targeted promotions, and Stripe-powered split payments that automatically distribute revenue between the platform and stores.

features.title: Real-Time Order Tracking
features.description: Live GPS tracking of delivery drivers with estimated arrival times and order status updates.

features.title: Smart Coupon Engine
features.description: Geo-targeted promotions and personalized discount codes based on shopping history and location.

features.title: Split Payment System
features.description: Stripe Connect integration for automatic revenue distribution between platform and vendors.

features.title: Multi-Vendor Marketplace
features.description: Each supermarket gets a branded storefront with custom inventory management and pricing.

features.title: Route Optimization
features.description: AI-powered delivery routing that minimizes time and fuel costs across multiple orders.

features.title: Smart Reordering
features.description: One-tap reorder of previous baskets with automatic price and availability updates.

process.description: Researched local grocery delivery landscape, interviewed store owners and frequent shoppers.
Designed scalable microservices architecture with real-time WebSocket communication.
Simultaneously built customer app, driver app, and vendor dashboard with shared API layer.
End-to-end testing of order flow, payment processing, and delivery tracking systems.
Launched city by city, onboarding stores and training delivery teams at each stage.

testimonial.quote: Weem gave our supermarket the technology to compete with the big players. Our delivery orders tripled within three months of launching.
testimonial.author: Sara Khalil

title: Dars
description: An online academy platform offering live courses, instructor profiles, and a responsive storefront with limited-time promotions across web and mobile.
tagline: Where knowledge meets modern learning
challenge: Traditional online learning platforms felt outdated and generic. The client wanted a premium, engaging academy experience that could host live interactive classes, manage instructor profiles, process course purchases, and deliver time-sensitive promotional campaigns — all with a modern, magazine-quality design.
solution: We designed and built a full-stack e-learning platform with real-time video classrooms, an instructor dashboard for content management, a course storefront with countdown-driven promotions, progress tracking, and certificate generation — all wrapped in a sleek, responsive interface.

features.title: Live Interactive Classes
features.description: Real-time video classrooms with screen sharing, chat, hand-raising, and recording capabilities.

features.title: Instructor Profiles
features.description: Rich instructor pages with biography, credentials, course listings, and student reviews.

features.title: Course Storefront
features.description: Beautiful course catalog with categories, search, and limited-time promotional pricing.

features.title: Certificate Generation
features.description: Automated PDF certificates with verification codes upon course completion.

features.title: Learning Analytics
features.description: Student dashboards showing progress, quiz scores, watch time, and completion rates.

features.title: Countdown Promotions
features.description: Flash sale engine with countdown timers, bundle discounts, and referral rewards.

process.description: Worked with educators to define course structures, assessment types, and learning paths.
Built a comprehensive component library with accessibility-first design principles.
Next.js frontend, Node.js API, PostgreSQL database, and WebRTC video integration.
Migrated existing courses, student data, and instructor profiles from legacy systems.
Deployed platform and trained instructors on content management and live class tools.

testimonial.quote: Dars doesn't just look premium — it feels premium. Our instructors love the live class tools and students keep coming back for more courses.
testimonial.author: Lina Haddad

title: 1K Coffee
description: A coffee shop loyalty and ordering app with QR-based rewards, in-app ordering, point collection, and a seamless digital payment experience.
tagline: Your favorite brew, one tap away
challenge: The coffee chain was losing repeat customers to competitors with digital loyalty programs. Paper punch cards were easily lost, and there was no way to push targeted promotions or analyze customer preferences. They needed a mobile-first solution that made ordering fast and loyalty rewarding.
solution: We built a sleek mobile app with QR-based loyalty scanning, mobile ordering with customization, a points-to-rewards conversion system, push notification campaigns, and a barista-facing tablet dashboard for order management — all integrated with their existing POS system.

features.title: QR Loyalty Scanning
features.description: Scan at checkout to earn points — replaces paper punch cards with a digital rewards system.

features.title: Mobile Ordering
features.description: Browse the menu, customize drinks, and place orders ahead for express pickup.

features.title: Rewards & Redemption
features.description: Earn points on every purchase, redeem for free drinks, upgrades, and exclusive merch.

features.title: Smart Notifications
features.description: Personalized push notifications for happy hours, new menu items, and bonus point events.

features.title: Barista Dashboard
features.description: Tablet-optimized order management interface for baristas with queue and preparation tracking.

features.title: Customer Insights
features.description: Analytics dashboard showing popular items, peak hours, and customer retention metrics.

process.description: Immersed in the coffee shop's brand identity to design an app that feels like an extension of their space.
Delivered clickable prototypes within two weeks, iterated based on barista and customer feedback.
Built cross-platform app with Firebase backend, Stripe payments, and QR code scanning.
Connected with existing point-of-sale system for seamless order and payment synchronization.
Piloted in 3 flagship locations, refined based on real-world usage before full chain rollout.

testimonial.quote: Our customers love the app. The QR loyalty system replaced our old punch cards overnight, and mobile ordering reduced our wait times dramatically.
testimonial.author: Omar Fayed

title: Lexara
description: A legal document analysis tool powered by NLP that extracts key clauses, flags risks, and generates contract summaries.
tagline: AI-powered legal intelligence at your fingertips
challenge: Law firms were spending thousands of hours manually reviewing contracts, often missing critical clauses or risk factors buried in dense legal language. They needed an AI solution that could understand legal context, extract actionable insights, and reduce review time without compromising accuracy.
solution: We developed an AI-powered document analysis platform using fine-tuned GPT-4 models trained on legal corpora. The system extracts key clauses, flags risk indicators, generates plain-language summaries, and provides side-by-side contract comparisons — reducing review time by over 70%.

features.title: Smart Clause Extraction
features.description: AI identifies and categorizes key contractual clauses including indemnity, termination, and liability.

features.title: Risk Assessment Engine
features.description: Automated risk scoring with highlighted problematic clauses and suggested amendments.

features.title: Contract Comparison
features.description: Side-by-side document comparison highlighting differences, additions, and removed terms.

features.title: Plain-Language Summaries
features.description: AI-generated executive summaries translating complex legal terms into clear business language.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: SOC 2 Type II compliant with end-to-end encryption, role-based access, and audit trails.

features.title: Clause Library
features.description: Searchable repository of standard clauses with industry benchmarks and best practices.

process.description: Partnered with practicing attorneys to understand contract review workflows and pain points.
Fine-tuned GPT-4 on proprietary legal datasets with attorney-validated training examples.
Built scalable web platform with Python backend, React frontend, and Kubernetes orchestration.
Achieved SOC 2 Type II certification, implemented encryption and access control systems.
Custom deployment for law firms with training, data migration, and ongoing support.

testimonial.quote: Lexara fundamentally changed how our firm reviews contracts. What used to take days now takes hours, with better accuracy than our manual process.
testimonial.author: James Whitfield

title: Nourish

features.title: AI Meal Planner

features.title: Photo Meal Tracking

features.title: Smart Grocery Lists
features.description: Auto-generated shopping lists organized by store section with price estimates.

features.title: Goal Tracking
features.description: Visual dashboards for calories, macros, hydration, and weekly nutrition targets.

features.title: Recipe Library
features.description: Thousands of recipes filterable by cuisine, prep time, difficulty, and dietary needs.

features.title: Family Plans
features.description: Manage meal plans for the whole family with individual preference profiles.

process.description: Surveyed 500+ users about nutrition pain points and analyzed competitor gaps.
Trained food recognition models and built recipe recommendation engine.
Built cross-platform app with React Native and Python microservices backend.
Three-month beta with 200 users, iterating on accuracy and UX feedback.
Launched with influencer partnerships and content marketing strategy.

testimonial.quote: Nourish made healthy eating effortless. The AI meal plans save me hours every week and I've never eaten better.
testimonial.author: Emily Chen

description: A real-time fleet management dashboard with GPS tracking, driver behavior analytics, vehicle diagnostics, and predictive maintenance alerts.
tagline: Every vehicle, every mile, under control

features.title: Live GPS Tracking

features.title: Driver Behavior Scoring

features.title: Predictive Maintenance

features.title: Compliance Reporting

features.title: Smart Alerts

process.description: Evaluated OBD-II devices, GPS hardware, and communication protocols for fleet integration.

Trained predictive maintenance models on historical vehicle diagnostic data.
Piloted with 50-vehicle fleet, then scaled to 500+ vehicles across three countries.

testimonial.quote: FleetPulse gave us complete visibility into our operations. The predictive maintenance alone saved us hundreds of thousands in repair costs.

process.description: Researched local grocery delivery landscape, interviewed store owners and frequent shoppers.
Designed scalable microservices architecture with real-time WebSocket communication.
Simultaneously built customer app, driver app, and vendor dashboard with shared API layer.
End-to-end testing of order flow, payment processing, and delivery tracking systems.
Launched city by city, onboarding stores and training delivery teams at each stage.

testimonial.quote: Weem gave our supermarket the technology to compete with the big players. Our delivery orders tripled within three months of launching.
testimonial.author: Sara Khalil
